title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs in the AI boom, including exploding token consumption costs, low productive token spend rates (18% on shipped products), and concerns about investment decisions driven by "tokenmaxxing." The episode covers Anthropic's valuation milestone, Robinhood's AI trading features, and privacy-related questions about AI service integrations.
